messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
If the prior worker verdict is source-plausible but the gate failed only proof, source-term, section, or word-band checks, preserve that verdict and repair the failed fields. Do not invert the verdict unless the source boundary itself is wrong.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

action.description: May AP release payment after the vendor bank update?

context.action_boundary: May AP release payment after the vendor bank update?
context.anomaly_observed: The packet includes a bank-change alert, a vendor-master form, a callback record, and a payment-release authority.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Payment PAY-QUA-071 releases USD 73400 to Quanta Field Services account ending 8821 on 2026-06-28.
Bank-change alert remains visible for Quanta Field Services because the account changed this week.
Callback CALL-QUA-071 used the post-change invoice email thread, not the pre-change vendor master phone source, to confirm account ending 8821.
Vendor-master approval VM-QUA-071 approves account ending 8821 for Quanta Field Services.
Bank ownership BANK-QUA-071 confirms account ending 8821 is owned by Quanta Field Services.
Payment-release authority REL-QUA-071 approves Quanta Field Services, USD 73400, account ending 8821, release date 2026-06-28 before payment.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Payment after bank update is complete when the evidence chain collectively supplies: pre-change callback source, vendor-master account approval, bank ownership validation, and payment-release authority matching vendor, amount, account, and release date before payment. No single record must carry every field if the chain closes all four gates.

state_brief.current_position: source-bound action verification with adversarial cross-DNA repair
unresolved_dependencies: Repairs 041 by making chain-of-records policy explicit.
known_failure_risks: planning artifact treated as execution authority
adjacent source treated as exact source
state_brief.pinned_best_artifact_full_text:

    "binding_class": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN",
    "controlling_source_fact": "STD-QUA-071-P requires pre-change callback source in evidence chain",
    "escalate_rule_assessment": "CALL-QUA-071 explicitly used post-change email thread instead of pre-change vendor master phone source",
    "timing_scope_authority_dependency_check": "Payment-release authority REL-QUA-071 present but pre-change gate open"
  },
  "cited_evidence": [
    "CALL-QUA-071",
    "STD-QUA-071-P"
  ],
  "critical_features_preserved": [
    "source IDs",
    "action boundary",
    "policy exact-match rule"
  ],
  "final_answer": "ESCALATE. CALL-QUA-071 confirms use of post-change email thread rather than pre-change vendor master phone source. STD-QUA-071-P requires the pre-change callback source to close the chain. All other gates satisfied by VM-QUA-071, BANK-QUA-071, and REL-QUA-071 but this defect remains open before execution.",
  "open_blockers": [
    "pre-change callback source missing"
  ],
  "verification_verdict": "ESCALATE",
  "worker_role": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER"
}

latest_worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE. CALL-QUA-071 confirms use of post-change email thread rather than pre-change vendor master phone source. STD-QUA-071-P requires the pre-change callback source to close the chain. All other gates satisfied by VM-QUA-071, BANK-QUA-071, and REL-QUA-071 but this defect remains open before execution.

prompt_object.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton. Gov does not choose models.
